title: EC3: If AEW Had Any Courage, Throw Me In The Mix And Watch The Place Explode
summary: EC3 is currently a free agent after announcing his NWA departure to start the year. The former NWA Worlds Heavyweight Champion has teased a return to TNA and bringing back his Top 1% character in the...

title: AEW's Brody King Teases Singles Title Run After Reflecting On Tag Team Success
summary: Brody King, who has won the tag team and trios titles since joining AEW, has outlined his ambitions to win singles gold in the promotion.
